explanation: The command substitutes '/i' with '-i' (substitution of equivalent syntax) and removes the colon after '-i' (omission of optional syntax), which may bypass the Sigma rule that checks for ' /i' or ' -i' with a colon.
The command omits the colon after '/i', which may bypass the Sigma rule that checks for '/i:' pattern.
The command changes the protocol from 'https' to 'http', which may bypass the Sigma rule that checks for 'https' but not 'http'.
